channel.title: Paper Review on Abdul HaQ
channel.description: Recent content in Paper Review on Abdul HaQ

item.title: Enterprise Entity Linking: Lessons from JPMorgan's JEL System
item.description: Insights from JPMorgan’s JEL system on how entity linking works in complex enterprise environments.

item.title: Recursive Language Models
item.description: The evolution of LLM implementation is moving away from “all-in-one” context-heavy prompts toward Recursive Language Model (RLM) architectures.

item.title: The Illusion of Thinking: Understanding the Strengths and Limitations of Reasoning Model
item.description: the “illusion” of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs), arguing that their step-by-step logic often mimics learned linguistic patterns rather than performing true, grounded reasoning..
